channel.title: Denys Hromniuk Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Denys Hromniuk Blog

item.title: Markdown Syntax Showcase
item.description: A sample post demonstrating basic Markdown and PaperMod features.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
This is a placeholder about me page.

Replace this text with your bio, experience, interests, and anything else you want visitors to know about you.

item.title: Hello, World!
item.description: My first post on this new PaperMod blog.

item.title: Another Day of Building
item.description: Short post about experimenting with static site generators.

item.title: Deploying to Netlify
item.description: A quick guide to deploying a Hugo site on Netlify.

item.title: Go Concurrency Patterns
item.description: Notes on common concurrency patterns in Go.

item.title: My Homelab Setup
item.description: Overview of my home server and services I self-host.

item.title: React Server Components
item.description: First impressions after migrating a Next.js app to the App Router.

item.title: Docker Tips for Small Teams
item.description: Practical Docker patterns that reduce friction in day-to-day development.

item.title: Python Type Hints
item.description: Why I started adding type hints to all my Python scripts.

item.title: Neovim as My Daily Driver
item.description: How I switched from VS Code to Neovim and what I gained.

item.title: Reading List: June 2025
item.description: Books and articles I enjoyed this month.
